events.label: assistant
events.text: Measured rotor thickness is 24.97 mm, but the minimum-thickness stamp on the hat is illegible in the image, so there's no spec to compare against. I recorded `decision: needs_more_info` in `/app/answer.json`, flagging that the OEM discard spec must be looked up (by part number) before the rotor can be judged pass/fail — guessing a tolerance on a safety-critical brake component isn't appropriate.
